schema.description:
An individual or business that purchases your service. It may refer to your users in your Site/Service/Application.
It's the ressource wich subscribe to offers.
When a customer subscribe to an offer it results the creation of a subscription which is a copy of the offer subscribed at the exact moment of the subscription.

IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdBusiness.description: Id of the Business this Customer belongs to.

Status.description:
High-level functional state of a customer, exposed to end users.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| Enabled | Customer is active — can subscribe, access the portal, manage subscriptions, and download invoices. |
| Suspended | Customer is suspended — portal and hosted pages are inaccessible. |
Status.title: CustomerFunctionalStatus

StateCustomer.description:
Granular technical state of a customer. Each value maps to a functional Status.

| Value | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Enabled | Enabled | Customer is active. |
| Suspended | Suspended | Customer has been suspended. |
StateCustomer.title: CustomerStatus

ReferenceCustomer.description: Shared Key of the Customer between ProAbono and your application.

DateAffiliation.description: Date of affiliation of the Customer.

schema.title: Customer
